## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test or tooling

## Validation

- [ ] Frontend lint/build run, or not applicable
- [ ] Backend tests run, or not applicable
- [ ] Collab server build run, or not applicable
- [ ] Manual UI check completed, or not applicable

Commands run:

```text

```

## Screenshots or Notes

Add screenshots, recordings, logs, migration notes, or operational details when helpful.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and reviewable.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, local databases, logs, or generated noise are included.
- [ ] Security or privacy impact has been considered.
